purpose: Define source-safe preview validation for HR/platform assignment synchronization conflicts without writing Firestore, HR or Make, and without using sensitive/raw source data.
mappingRules: A platform assignment and an HR assignment are the same only when tenantId, projectId and a stable visit key match, and shopperId is compatible.
Stable visit key can be visitId, hrRowId or sourceVisitRef; at least one must exist.
Do not dedupe by branch name, shopper display name, date, country, city or visual similarity alone.
If platform and HR disagree on shopperId, projectId, tenantId or hrRowId, classify conflict_review_required.
If a stable visit key or shopperId is missing, classify manual_review_required.
If platform assignment exists and HR later reflects the same stable assignment, classify already_reflected_no_duplicate.
If HR assignment exists and no platform assignment exists for the stable key, classify hr_detected_new_assignment.
If platform assignment exists and HR has not reflected it yet, classify platform_pending_hr_sync.
Cancelled visits or cancelled assignments must not be silently reassigned.
No writes, no Make calls and no HR updates are allowed by this preview.
outputRules: Validator prints JSON report only; no output files are written by default.
Report must include counters for platform assignments, HR assignments, matched, pending, conflicts and manual review.
Mapped rows must contain only safe refs and IDs, not raw sensitive data.
All gates remain false in the report.
claudePrototypeImpact: Postulaciones and assignment UI must show prepared/pending HR sync, not HR synchronized, while gates are off.
If HR and platform conflict, UI must show review required and not overwrite silently.
Available visits must not duplicate once assigned by either platform or HR preview.
UI must surface stable references for admin review without exposing sensitive data.

newLessons: How platform assignment and HR assignment match safely
Why visual matching is not enough
What happens when HR and platform disagree
How to keep available visits from duplicating
How source-safe assignment preview protects data
interactiveChecklists: Before showing assignment status to shopper

hardStops: Do not call Make from this preview.
Do not write HR from this preview.
Do not write Firestore from this preview.
Do not overwrite assignment conflicts silently.
Do not dedupe by visual matching.
Do not process raw sensitive fields.
Do not mark HR synchronized while sync gates are off.
